title: Squishy's Reanimated Mobs
description: This Resource Pack aims to reanimate the many simple mobs in Minecraft, to give them new life and detail, as well as a few small model/texture touch-ups.
body:
Squishy's Reanimated Mobs
=========================

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This Resource Pack aims to reanimate the many simple mobs in minecraft, to give them new life and detail, as well as a few small model/texture touch-ups.

This Pack would not be possible without the use of the new and fancy JEM mod. Thanks to JEM, it is possible to completely change entity models, animations, and textures; and it doesn't even require that stinky Optifine!

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Want to add mod support?

If you have a mod, or like a mod, and would like to port animations to a mob in that mod that's similar to an already animated mob(For example creepers from Creeper Overhaul are similar to normal Creepers). You can rig the mods model to follow the format in this pack, and send me the model and texture so I can port the animations over to it, and formally add it to this pack :)

To see the rigging format, you can import the .json models from this pack to see how it looks, or you can reach out to me on discord for further help.(Discord Link Below)


\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you want to be notified when there are updates(like newly finished mobs), see progress on WIP mods, ask for help, or just join a small community, join the discord!
 https://discord.gg/9BsXxetFwz

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The currently Finished Mobs included:

*   Creeper
*   Enderman
*   Adult Zombie(with variants!)
*   Baby Zombie(with rare variant)
*   Skeleton
*   Spider(with rare variant)

### Mod Compatibilities:

* [Ore Creepers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ore-creeper "Ore Creepers")

This pack requires:
--------------------

[![JEM](https://i.imgur.com/lcdHB7I.png "JEM")](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-entity-models-jems)
